raw_text:
Junior Android Engineer

Velocity Mobile Labs — Empowering mobile-first experiences for the next billion users

Location

San Francisco, CA (Remote-First)

Employment Type

Full-Time

Compensation

$85,000 - $110,000 per year

The Opportunity

We're seeking a Junior Android Engineer to join our mobile engineering team. You'll work with modern

Android development practices using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose to build features for our flagship

fintech application. This role is perfect for developers with 0-2 years of professional experience who

are passionate about Android development and eager to grow their skills in a collaborative, supportive

environment. You'll contribute to real features shipped to millions of users while receiving mentorship

from senior engineers.

About Velocity Mobile Labs

Velocity Mobile Labs is a growth-stage fintech startup focused on building seamless mobile payment
and financial services solutions for emerging markets. We're committed to creating intuitive Android
applications that make financial services accessible, secure, and user-friendly. Our engineering team

spans multiple continents, and we pride ourselves on mentoring early-career developers while
shipping production-quality code.

Day-to-Day

Develop new UI features and screens using Jetpack Compose and Kotlin for our main Android

application

Implement REST API integration using modern networking libraries and handle data persistence
with Room database

Write clean, testable code following Android best practices and participate in code reviews with
senior engineers

Debug and troubleshoot issues using Android Studio and logcat, creating detailed bug reports and
fixes

Collaborate with product and design teams to translate requirements into functional Android
features

Learn and apply Kotlin coroutines for asynchronous operations and background task management

Participate in the full app release cycle, from development to Play Store deployment and
monitoring

Contribute to improving app performance and user experience through profiling and optimization

You Have

0-2 years of professional Android development experience or equivalent (bootcamp + internships)

 Strong proficiency in Kotlin programming language

Solid understanding of Android architecture components and lifecycle management

Familiarity with Jetpack libraries (Navigation, ViewModel, LiveData/StateFlow basics)

Experience with Git version control and collaborative development workflows

Bonus

Hands-on experience with Jetpack Compose or declarative UI frameworks

Experience with Room database or other local data persistence solutions

Understanding of Kotlin Coroutines and async programming patterns

Published personal Android app on Google Play Store

Our Stack

Kotlin   Jetpack Compose   Android Studio   Kotlin Coroutines   Room Database   Jetpack Navigation

ViewModel & LiveData   Retroﬁt/OkHttp   Google Play Console   Firebase Analytics

What We Offer

Competitive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) covering 100% of employee premiums

Flexible remote work policy with optional access to San Francisco office

Professional development budget ($2,000/year) for courses, conferences, and learning materials

Mentorship program pairing junior engineers with senior technical leads

Generous paid time off (20 days) plus flexible sick leave

Stock options for all full-time employees

Free snacks, coffee, and monthly team lunch budget for remote collaboration

Apply

Submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your Android development experience, and a GitHub
profile or portfolio of Android projects to careers@velocitymobilelabs.com. Shortlisted candidates will
be invited for a technical phone screening, followed by a take-home coding challenge and team
interviews. We review applications on a rolling basis.
company: Android development and eager to grow their skills in a collaborative
nice_to_have: Hands-on experience with Jetpack Compose or declarative UI frameworks
Experience with Room database or other local data persistence solutions
Understanding of Kotlin Coroutines and async programming patterns
